[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Fenris''' was an officer in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Biography==
Fenris once led a briefing detailing [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[First attack on the Enforcer|attack]] on [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Kohrin]]'s [[Admiral Kohrin's second fleet|fleet]] and [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], [[Enforcer (Executor-class)|''Enforcer'']]. Though he was not at the actual briefing (he was in fact in orbit above the planet it was held on), his presence seemed to fill the hall, anyway, from his projection in the [[Holoprojector/Legends|holotank]]. After the briefing, he led a [[Second attack on the Enforcer|second attack]] on the ''Enforcer'' while it was being repaired at [[Phaylenn]]. His attack was extremely successful, not only destroying the ''Enforcer'' but the [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] it was being repaired in also.

{{Char-stub}}
